summary: Video of Labor Secretary Lori Chavez-DeRemer speaking at a 'Merry Christmas' rally, with the camera static on her at the podium across all frames. She states that all net job growth under Trump went to American-born workers and refers to a coming 'golden age,' over a persistent 'TEXT POTUS TO 45470' lower-third. The footage is speech with a text overlay.
notable_text: Lower-third: 'TEXT "POTUS" TO 45470 FOR UPDATES FROM THE WHITE HOUSE'; stage banners 'MERRY CHRISTMAS!'; crowd signs 'BIGGER PAYCHECKS', 'LOWER PRICES', 'JESUS TRAINED'. Quote: 'all net growth under President Trump has been in the private sector and they've gone to American-born workers... the golden age of America is on the horizon.'
